stemHtml: Mountain wave turbulence's impact can be observed...

options.a: Up to 6 NM behind the mountain range and between 1 500 ft and 6 000 ft.
options.b: Up to 60 NM behind the mountain range and up to highest mountain tip.
options.c: Up to 600 NM behind the mountain range and up to the tropopause.
options.d: Only directly overhead the mountain range and up to the tropopause.
